hook.summary: Split-screen comparing high-tech military command with satisfying smart missile gameplay.
hook.visual_action: Soldiers in AR headsets gesture over a holographic table while gameplay below shows green missiles destroying pink enemy swarms.
hook.text_overlay: POV: You just unlocked smart missiles

scene_flow: Split-screen showing military command center and smart missile gameplay.
Close-up of smart missiles spiraling out to destroy large clusters of enemies.
Transition to game logo 'THE TOWER' and 'PLAY FREE' call to action.
Final gameplay montage showing advanced tower defense mechanics and high-level progression.
on_screen_text: POV: You just unlocked smart missiles
audience_proxy: Male gamers 18-35 who enjoy tactical tower defense and incremental progression games.
